subcodes.first_line: O sagacious man! Thou hast recited verses of gratitude unto God, inasmuch as He hath strengthened thee to walk in the path of guidance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها الرجل الرشید قد تلوت ایات شکرک لله بما ایدک علی السلوک فی صراط الهدی و
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @consorting with all; being kind; loving to all
